name: Heaven-Trampling Transcendence
description: Wang Lin crosses the nine Heaven-Trampling Bridges and transcends with Li Muwan. Resolves the majority of his accumulated karma.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Heaven-Trampling Transcendence. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
